misc: Always a gentleman despite occasionally losing his temper on the course
biography: Daniel, a familiar face at the Hector Trophée, hails from Oulujokilaakson Golfklubi ry and is known for his competitive spirit and mostly gentlemanly demeanor, even if he occasionally struggles to contain his frustration on the course.

With seven past appearances in the tournament, Daniel brings a wealth of experience to the competition. Over the years, Daniel has secured the coveted Hector Trophée twice, demonstrating his skill in pair formats. While the Victor Trophy has eluded him so far, he remains a formidable player in the individual rounds.

Although Daniel is not currently slated to participate in the upcoming Hector Trophée 2026, golf enthusiasts know that last-minute changes can occur. His continued presence in Hector events speaks volumes about his commitment to the sport.
